title: isatis tinctoria var. alpina
intro: Isatis tinctoria var. alpina, commonly known as Alpina woad or Alpine woad, is a plant species in the Brassicaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The medicinal properties of Isatis tinctoria var. alpina are said to help with the health benefits of reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and boosting the immune system. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations such as tea, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
